meta.purpose: Preparation phase + footwork concepts extending the swing-centric knowledge graph. New concepts cover Split Step, Unit Turn sub-components, Stance, Pivot, Recovery, FTT-specific terms (Press Slot, Place-Pull, Hold-it-Up, Scapular Glide, Triple Bend, Multi-Split-Step, X-stretch). Each concept carries a layer attribute (L1=contact, L2=rhythm/timing, L3=kinetic chain, L4=preparation, L5=footwork) for top-down diagnostic prioritization.

nodes.name: Late Split Step
nodes.description: 对手击球瞬间球员尚未起跳/已落地过久。Tomaz: 'land as they hit'。FTT: 错过反应窗口。源：feel_tennis_preparation §3, tom_allsopp_footwork §1.
vlm_features: 对手击球帧球员双脚仍在地面
落地后停顿>3帧才启动第一步

nodes.name: Missing Split Step
nodes.description: 完全没有分腿垫步，球员处于静止站立等球。所有教练共识此为业余首要错误之一。源：feel_tennis_preparation §3.
vlm_features: 对手击球前后双脚Y坐标无下沉再启动

nodes.name: Split Step Too High / Stiff Landing
nodes.description: 把split误解为jump，落地有'砸'感，膝盖深屈，丢失弹性。FTT/Tomaz: should bounce off the ground. 源：tom_allsopp_footwork §1, feel_tennis §3.4.
vlm_features: 双脚明显腾空
落地后膝角<140°且停顿

nodes.name: Missing Pivot Step
nodes.description: 右脚（持拍侧）未做外旋pivot，整个人横向滑出。Tom Allsopp: pivot必须与unit turn同帧或差1-2帧。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §2.
vlm_features: 右脚朝向角度变化<20°
右脚后跟未离地

nodes.name: Late Pivot
nodes.description: Pivot在unit turn之后才发生，导致脚-髋-肩节奏倒置。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §2 + diagnostic_methodology Step5.
vlm_features: pivot帧晚于肩转启动帧>3帧

nodes.name: Choppy Adjustment Steps
nodes.description: 进入击球区前4+次碎步。Tom Allsopp: 第一步方向错+split晚的复合症状。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §4.
vlm_features: split到contact之间脚步>4次

nodes.name: Missing Recovery Step
nodes.description: 击球后停留原地或朝错方向回中。'recovery是下一拍split的开始'。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §4.
vlm_features: follow-through后5帧内无横向位移

nodes.name: Late Unit Turn
nodes.description: Unit Turn在球落地后才启动，违背'racket back before the ball bounces'。源：feel_tennis §4.1, tom_allsopp_unit_turn §6.
vlm_features: 球落地帧时肩转<30°

nodes.name: Arm-Only Unit Turn
nodes.name_zh: 只用手臂引拍（非整体转）
nodes.description: 肩没转、髋没转，只有右肘后移。左手未搭拍颈。Tomaz: violates 'turn as a unit'. 源：feel_tennis §2, tom_allsopp_unit_turn §1.
vlm_features: 肩转<20°但手腕已到右后方
左手仍在身侧

nodes.name: No Scapular Glide
nodes.description: FTT特有：非持拍侧肩胛骨未先于手臂启动；球衣背部无褶皱。'The back is the glue'失效。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1, §2.
vlm_features: 背部肩胛区无视觉滑动
肘部紧贴躯干

nodes.name: Racket Head Drop Too Early (No Hold-it-Up)
nodes.name_zh: 拍头过早下垂（未Hold it Up）
nodes.description: FTT特有：准备结束就主动垂拍头/后翻。Hold up失效→需要更长前挥距离→Press Slot错位。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1, §4.
vlm_features: unit turn结束帧拍头低于手腕
拍头主动后翻

nodes.name: Left Hand Dropped In Unit Turn
nodes.description: 左手在unit turn阶段没有搭在拍颈/拍喉上，导致单臂引拍。Tom: 'left hand on the throat'. 源：tom_allsopp_unit_turn §1.
vlm_features: unit turn阶段左手与拍颈距离>30cm

nodes.name: Left Shoulder Not Forward
nodes.description: Tomaz feel cue: 'go forward with your left shoulder first'. 缺失则unit turn变为右臂后拉。源：feel_tennis_preparation §2.2.
vlm_features: 准备早期左肩位移<右肩位移

nodes.name: Insufficient Hip-Shoulder Separation
nodes.description: Tom Allsopp: 引拍顶点肩比髋多转~45°；<20°=无扭矩；35-55°=理想。源：tom_allsopp_unit_turn §2.
vlm_features: 引拍顶点肩-髋分离角<20°

nodes.name: Fake Separation (Upper-Body-Only)
nodes.description: 肩转60°+但髋几乎没动，分离角看似>70°实为虚假。源：tom_allsopp_unit_turn §4.

nodes.name: Stop-Start Syndrome
nodes.description: Tom: 引拍顶点静止≥5帧（60fps），引擎熄火。源：tom_allsopp_unit_turn §1, §4 (CmXxvX60TOI).
vlm_features: 引拍顶点静止帧>=5

nodes.name: Preparation Not Complete By Ball Bounce
nodes.description: Tomaz铁律: racket back before the ball bounces. 不达成则被迫匆忙挥拍，contact偏后。源：feel_tennis_preparation §4.1.
vlm_features: 球落地帧unit turn未到顶点

nodes.name: No Wait After Preparation
nodes.name_zh: 准备完未等待（一气呵成）
nodes.description: Tomaz: 'turn quickly, then wait for the ball before accelerating.' 准备和挥拍混在一起→总打晚。源：feel_tennis §4.2.
vlm_features: unit turn到挥拍启动无角速度低谷

nodes.name: Narrow Stance
nodes.description: FTT: 站姿应宽于肩。窄站姿→重心垂直起伏→拍头轨迹不稳。Nadal视频中作为练习/比赛差距根因。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §2 (#4), §4.
vlm_features: 双脚间距<肩宽

nodes.name: No Triple Bend
nodes.description: FTT: 准备时踝/膝/髋应同时弯曲。只蹲膝或只折髋=动力链未加载。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Triple Bend), §2.

nodes.name: No Landing In Motion
nodes.name_zh: 落地后才启动（非动态落地）
nodes.description: FTT: split落地必须直接转化为向球的第一步。Land then start = 错过窗口。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1, §5.
vlm_features: 落地后停顿>2帧才出现第一步水平位移

nodes.name: Failed Neutral→Semi-Open Transition
nodes.name_zh: 中性站位转半开放失败
nodes.description: Pivot不充分导致左脚未自然到达45°半开放位置，需要补步。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §3.
vlm_features: pivot后双脚连线与底线>70°或<20°
多余补步出现

nodes.name: Press Slot Not Reached
nodes.description: FTT特有：触球前手部应到达稳定的'压迫槽位'。无论引拍风格如何，slot位置应一致。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Press Slot), §2 (#8).
vlm_features: 前挥启动帧手部相对躯干位置每次不同
推墙测试无反作用力

nodes.name: Backswinging Instead of Placing
nodes.description: FTT口令更替：'Place, Pull Forward'取代'Backswing'。主动后挥→挥拍路径过长→比赛崩溃。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Place Pull), §4.
vlm_features: 拍头有明显主动向后翻滚
引拍轨迹大于'放置'到位的最短路径

nodes.name: No Multi-Split-Step On Ball Machine
nodes.name_zh: 球机训练时无连续分腿垫步
nodes.description: FTT: 无对手时应用多次小split保持神经兴奋。单次split→比赛'找不到节奏'。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Multi-Split-Step), §4.
vlm_features: 球机训练每次击球间无连续小垫步

nodes.name: Arm Used For Balance In Movement
nodes.name_zh: 跑动中用持拍臂保持平衡
nodes.description: FTT: 'Arm in Ready State'——平衡交给腿和核心。手臂离开准备状态→Apparatus失刚性。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Arm in Ready State), §4.
vlm_features: 跑动中持拍臂前后摆动幅度>30cm

nodes.name: No X Stretch
nodes.description: FTT: 准备完成时左肩↔右髋的对角线拉长是肩髋分离的可视证据。缺失则蓄力不足。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (X Stretch).
vlm_features: 左肩-右髋距离与初始相比无明显延长

nodes.name: Grip Not Innervated
nodes.description: FTT/Innervation: 准备阶段需手指对柄建立触觉映射。死握或松垮都会让后续动力链'盲发力'。源：ftt_youtube_preparation §1 (Innervation/Pivot Point).
vlm_features: 准备阶段手指与柄之间有可见间隙
握拍异常僵硬

nodes.name: Late First Step
nodes.description: split落地后超过2帧才有第一步。是late split与no pivot的下游。源：tom_allsopp_footwork §2.
vlm_features: split落地帧到第一步水平位移帧>2

nodes.name: Late Preparation (Composite)
nodes.description: Late split→late unit turn→prep未在ball bounce前完成的复合症状。文献：40%击球错误起源于preparation phase。源：diagnostic_methodology §3, §6.
vlm_features: 球落地帧准备进度<70%

nodes.name: Cramped Swing - No Time To Extend
nodes.name_zh: 挥拍被挤压无时间延展
nodes.description: Late pivot/late prep的下游：到了击球区身体来不及伸展，contact偏后。源：diagnostic_methodology §3.
vlm_features: contact帧时手臂明显内收

nodes.name: Forced Rush, Contact Behind Body
nodes.description: Preparation incomplete by ball bounce的最终下游表现。源：diagnostic_methodology §3 表格.
vlm_features: contact点位于躯干侧面甚至后方

nodes.name: No Side Bending at Contact
nodes.description: 击球瞬间脊柱与地面接近垂直（≥85°），说明纯水平旋转、丢失侧弯发力。源：video_watching_findings §3.2 (FTT wFIrPMutzRo).
vlm_features: 正面机位脊柱-地面夹角≥85°
肩线水平无倾斜

nodes.name: Takeback Speed Doesn't Match Incoming Ball
nodes.name_zh: 引拍速度与来球速度不匹配
nodes.description: 引拍角速度/来球速度比例 > 2.0，意味着早早把动作做完然后停下等球。Tom Allsopp: 'slow ball, slow takeback'。源：video_watching_findings §3.3, §4.3.
vlm_features: 引拍速度远快于来球速度
引拍完成后到contact之间出现停顿

nodes.name: Slow-Motion Practice Mode (Static Wait)
nodes.name_zh: 慢动作练习模式（等球完全静止）
nodes.description: 击球间隙约30帧窗口内双脚完全静止、无任何低幅度跳动，业余级'练习模式'的核心特征。源：video_watching_findings §3.2 §3.3 (FTT BbGzWTp5pCM).
vlm_features: 等球30帧内脚部Y坐标位移=0
站位窄于肩宽

nodes.name: Late Split-Step Ball Recognition
nodes.name_zh: 分裂步落地后才识别来球方向
nodes.description: 分裂步空中相位时躯干和视线方向与最终来球方向不一致，落地后才出现明显的躯干转向。Federer的秘诀是空中即完成预判。源：video_watching_findings §3.4 (Quentin FOmz8Wjv3DQ).
vlm_features: split airborne phase 躯干朝向≠ball direction
落地后≥3帧才出现躯干转向

nodes.name: Racket Pivot Point at Butt Cap (Not V-Grip)
nodes.name_zh: 球拍支点在底盖（不在虎口）
nodes.description: 握拍时底部三指紧握、虎口V字松散，导致球拍旋转支点在底盖而非虎口——结构性原因让lag物理上不可能产生。源：video_watching_findings §3.2 §4.2 (FTT pWzyP-xfLfU).
vlm_features: 低角度握拍特写：底部三指紧绷
拍头摆动时整个手柄绕底盖旋转

nodes.name: Chasing The Ball Instead of Intercepting
nodes.description: 击球瞬间拍头速度向量与来球向量同向（夹角<90°），表示拍头跟着球走而不是迎向球。Tomaz: 'racket and ball going toward each other'。源：feel_tennis_video_findings §4.3.
vlm_features: contact帧拍头向量与来球向量夹角<90°
击球点位于躯干侧面或后方

nodes.name: Pre-Landing Body/Gaze Orientation
nodes.name_zh: 落地前躯干与视线已对准来球
nodes.description: Quentin/Federer footwork秘诀：分裂步空中相位即完成视觉+躯干预判，落地瞬间已朝向来球方向，实现'落地即出发'。源：video_watching_findings §3.4.
vlm_features: split airborne phase 躯干已转向ball direction
落地后0-1帧出现第一步

edges.evidence: diagnostic_methodology §3: late split → late prep chain
FTT: scapular glide is the kinetic chain bridge
tom_allsopp §1 left hand on the throat
FTT: slot is the chain entry point
long backswing path → stop at top
no time to extend → no forward extension
X stretch is the visible evidence of separation
tom_allsopp_footwork §4 - recovery is next split's start
video_watching §3.3: static wait → reaction window missed
video_watching §4.2 (FTT pivot point) - butt-cap pivot makes lag impossible → forearm compensation
Tom Allsopp: early completion → top stall
Johnny FTT: no side bend = no rotation power transfer
